ac:rich-text-body.p: Standard operating procedure for reviewing, releasing, and closing out a story through the QA workflows and Daily ingestion pipeline. All actions in this procedure are performed by the Admin Reviewer.

ol.li: Read the story and understand the requirements.
List the governance details of the artifacts.
Review code for stylistic deficiencies, coding best practices, and standards.
Request changes if deficiencies are found.
Request changes if deficiencies are found.

li.p: Run the appropriate Release Workflow based on the table scenario:

tr.td: Creates a table that does not yet exist
Deletes the existing table, then creates it back

li.p: Go to the workflow tasks and change the following, depending on the story's requirements:

ul.li: Change the clusters to be used
Change the source to the repo (Git provider)
Insert the repo URL in the repo settings
Insert the branch name in the repo settings (Git ref)
Select the branch in the Git reference
Select GitHub Enterprise Server as the provider
Insert the notebook path in the task settings

ol.li: If the workflow fails, request changes.
If the workflow succeeds, request Immuta tags if needed.

ac:rich-text-body.p: Immuta tags are requested by sending an email to the Data Governance Steward. The email must contain:

ul.li: Action – tagging a new table, or refreshing the tags of an existing table
Immuta tags (new tables only) – applicable tags: W&B, LG, Carbon

ol.li: After Immuta provisioning, orchestrate a full re-create workflow with all the pipeline dependencies for the story.
If the re-create workflow fails, request changes.
Approve and merge code to master, then pull the master repo into the Databricks QA_Workflow repo.
If the re-create workflow succeeds, add orchestration to the QA_Workflow_Daily (adding it via YAML is easier).
Wait for a Daily ingestion to run completely on its schedule.

ac:rich-text-body.p: The Daily ingestion runs every day at 6:00 PM AST and typically takes ~2.5 hours to complete.

ol.li: On a successful run, mark the story as Released.

ac:structured-macro.ac:parameter: If Daily ingestion fails after release

ac:rich-text-body.p: Roll back the changes to the workflow job and perform the turnback process.
